title: SEC's Investor Advisory Committee Votes to Recommend Tokenized Securities Regulations With Narrow Exemptions for On-Chain Stock Trading
message_html: SEC's Investor Advisory Committee Votes to Recommend Tokenized Securities Regulations With Narrow Exemptions for On-Chain Stock Trading ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): POLICY: The SEC’s Investor Advisory Committee voted Thursday to recommend tokenized securities regulations, including narrow exemptions for on-chain stock trading with mandatory disclosures, routine audits and best-execution requirements.
